description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 23, 2025 at 10:36 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a van on Crestlake Drive at Sloat Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing south with its right turn signal activated on Crestlake Drive for a stop sign at the intersection with Sloat 
Boulevard. While the Waymo AV remained stopped for westbound traffic on Sloat Boulevard, a van that was traveling eastbound on 
Crestlake Drive and making a right turn towards the intersection with Sloat Boulevard approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the 
front of the van made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Waymo is reporting this crash under Request No. 2 of Standing General Order 2021-01. Waymo may supplement or correct its reporting 
with additional information as it may become available.
Print
Clear Form
